economic_notes: Nation has two government business enterprises: Shxw'owhamel Ventures Limited Partnership (SVLP) at 99.9% ownership and Shxw'owhamel Ventures GP Ltd. (SVGP) at 100% ownership, accounted for using modified equity method. GBEs had combined revenues of $11,106,971 and net income of $4,165,235 for year ended December 31, 2021.
notes: Fiscal statements signed October 3, 2024 for year ended March 31, 2022 - significant delay in audit completion. Investment income of $1,764,386 and earnings from equity investments of $4,165,235 are substantial. Trans Mountain revenue of $5,597,366 is a significant revenue source likely related to pipeline project. Two GBEs (SVLP and SVGP) accounted for by modified equity method with fiscal year ending December 31, 2021 - different fiscal year than Nation. Current liabilities calculated from balance sheet excluding long-term debt: accounts payable $161,655 + interest payable $4,646 + wages payable $42,039 + damage deposits $7,480 + employee deductions payable $16,438 = $232,258. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $2,221,158 + FNHA $929,692 + Province of BC $344,688 + CMHC housing $107,150 + Sto:lo $78,026 + Government of Canada $2,215 + FNESC $92,347 + BCFN Gaming $171,714 + RRF $20,850 = $3,967,840 approximately. OSR includes investment income, rental, taxation, lease, Trans Mountain, equity earnings, and other revenue.
